【Safe and Health】FDA Approved, Food-grade Silicone coating, non-Teflon, no harmful substance release in high temperature, PTFE & PFOA FREE

【Make You Chef】Quickly make high quality family dishes, afternoon tea, banquet desserts and other delicacies. Easy to deal with daily cooking, family dinner, friends gathering, festival celebrations, etc. Spend less time and have more fun.

Use and care

1. Hand wash with mild cleanser in warm water. Use a soft sponge or nylon when necessary.

2. Not apply to non-stick spray for cooking use.

3. Apply to soft tools (silica gel, nylon, etc). Do not use sharp metal tools in case of scratch.

4. Not apply to fire or dish washer.

5. Not apply to microwave or electromagnetic oven.

FAQ

What else to notice when using the non-stick pan?

A. Please clean and dry the pan before first use.

B. Away from metal tools. Apply to soft tools (silica gel, nylon, etc).

C. Only apply to oven and fridge (put it in in low temperature). Not apply to fire, dish washer, microwave or electromagnetic oven.

D. Temperature range：-20℃ ~ 220℃. Please do not bake it without anything in it.

E. Clean the pan when it is in room temperature. Store it when it is dry and clean.

F.Slight scratches on the bakeware are OKAY.
